
ISLAMIC LIBRARY

I want to achieve -

Give that -

1# ISLAMIC SCIENCES

> Three categories of Islamic Sciences:
    1. Objective
    2. Instrumental
    3. Supplementary

> Each category has below sciences and sub-sciences:
    1. Objective
        a. Aqeedah
            i. Tawheed
            ii. Aqeedah
            iii. 'Itiqaad
            iv. Manhaj
        b. Fiqh
            i. Fiqh Madhhabb
                - Hanafi Fiqh 
                - Maaliki Fiqh
                - Shaafi'i Fiqh
                - Hanbali Fiqh
                - Dhaahiri Fiqh
            ii. Fiqh Ghayr Madhhabb
            iii. Hadith al-Ahkaam
            iv. Specific Topics of Fiqh (can have multiple sub-fields)
        c. Hadith
            i. Primary Collections
            ii. Secondary Collections
            iii. Arba'oon Collections
            iv. Specific Topics of Hadith (can have multiple sub-fields)
        d. Lughah al-Arabiyyah
            i. Nahw
            ii. Sarf
            iii. Balaaghah
            iv. Qaamoos
        e. Seerah an-Nabi
            i. Mukhtasar Seerah an-Nabi
            ii. Waasi' Seerah an-Nabi
            iii. Specific Topics of Seerah (can have multiple sub-fields)
        f. Tafseer
            i. Mukhtasar Tafseer
            ii. Waasi' Tafseer
            iii. Specific Topics of Tafseer (can have multiple sub-fields)
            iv. Translations
    2. Instrumental
        a. Uloom al-Aqeedah
            i. Uloom al-Firaq (can have multiple sub-fields)
            ii. Uloom al-Ad'iyaan (can have multiple sub-fields)
            iii. Atheism & Other Ideologies
            iv. Specific Topics of Aqeedah (can have multiple sub-fields)
        b. Uloom al-Fiqh
            i. Usool al-Fiqh
                - Hanafi Usool al-Fiqh 
                - Maaliki Usool al-Fiqh
                - Shaafi'i Usool al-Fiqh
                - Hanbali Usool al-Fiqh
                - Dhaahiri Usool al-Fiqh
                - Ghayr Madhaahib Usool al-Fiqh
            ii. Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh
                - Hanafi Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh 
                - Maaliki Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh
                - Shaafi'i Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh
                - Hanbali Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh
                - Dhaahiri Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh
                - Ghayr Madhaahib Qawaa'idh al-Fiqh
            iii. Madhaahib al-Fiqh
                - Hanafi 
                - Maaliki
                - Shaafi'i
                - Hanbali
                - Dhaahiri
        c. Uloom al-Hadith
            i. Ahmiyat as-Sunnah
            ii. Mustalah al-Hadith
            iii. Usool al-Hadith
            iv. 'Ilm ar-Rijaal
            v. Jarh wat-Ta'dheel
        d. Uloom al-Qur'aan
            i. Ahmiyat al-Qur'aan
            ii. Tajweed
            iii. Specifc Topics on Qur'aan (can have multiple sub-fields)
        e. Uloom as-Seerah
            i. Shamaail an-Nabi
            ii. Khasaais an-Nabi
            iii. Mu'jizaat an-Nabi
            iv. Specifc Topics on Nabi (can have multiple sub-fields)
            v. Seerah al-Ambiya war-Rusul
            vi. Seerah as-Sahaabah was-Sahaabiyyaat
            vii. Seerah at-Taa'bioon wa Atba' at-Taabi'oon
            viii. Seerah A'immah al-Muslimeen
            ix. Taareekh al-Islaamiyyah
            x. Specifc Topics in Taareekh (can have multiple sub-fields)
        f. Uloom at-Tafseer
            i. Usool at-Tafseer
            ii. Asbaab an-Nuzool
            x. Specifc Topics on Tafseer (can have multiple sub-fields)
    3. Supplementary
        a. Ta'leem
            i. Talab al-'Ilm
            ii. ad-Dhikr wad-Du'aa
            iii. al-Ash'hoor al-Islaamiyyah
        b. Tarbiyah
            i. Aadaab
            ii. Huqooq
            iii. Amaal al-Qalb
            iv. Mawaa'idh
        c. Tazkiyah
            i. Ruqyah
            ii. Tazkiyah an-Nafs
            iii. Zuhd
            iv. Tibb
        d. Raqaaeq
            i. Dunya
            ii. Aakhirah
            iii. Zawaajir
            iv. az-Zunoob wal-Ma'aasi
        e. Da'wah
            i. ad-Da'wah wad-Da'yee
            ii. Manhajiyyah fid-Da'wah
            iii. Naseehah
            iv. Specific Topics in Da'wah (can have multiple sub-fields)

> Above categories and sciences are fixed, while more sub-sciences might be added in future
> As mentioned, Specifc Topics sub-science might have multiple fields

2# ISLAMIC BOOKS

> Each book can be of 2 categories: 
    1. Text
    2. Poetry

> Each category book can be of 2 types:
    1. Original
    2. Explanation (NOTE: A original book can have multiple explanation books)

> Each book can be of 3 levels:
    1. Beginner
    2. Intermediate
    3. Advanced

> Each book has GDrive PDF links

> Each book PDF can be in 3 languages:
    1. English
    2. Urdu
    3. Arabic

> Each book PDF can be available in multiple print editions in each language

3# ISLAMIC YOUTUBE BOOK EXPLANATIONS

> Each book can be explained by multiple teachers

> A single teacher can explain the same book multiple times

> Each book has YouTube videos. YouTube links can be of 2 types:
    1. Single link - either a single video or a playlist
    2. Muliple links - split into multiple videos without a playlist

> Each YouTube video could be in 3 languages:
    1. English
    2. Urdu
    3. Arabic

4# IDEA OF A BOOK PAGE ({book}.md file)

> Islamic Science Details
    - Category (e.g., Objective)
    - Science (e.g., Aqeedah)
    - Sub-Science (e.g., Tawheed)
    - Field (if applicable)
    - Level (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced)

> Original Book Details
    - Name
    - Author
    - Book Type (Text/Poetry)
    - PDF links:
        - language #1
            - print #1
            - print #2
            .
            .
            .
        - language #2
        .
        .
        .
    - YouTube links:
        - Teacher #1 + language
            - link(s) explanation #1
            - link(s) explanation #2
            .
            .
            .
        - Teacher #2 + language 
        .
        .
        .

> Explanation Book 1 details (if any)
    - Name
    - Author 
    - Book Type (Text/Poetry)
    - PDF links:
        - language #1
            - print #1
            - print #2
            .
            .
            .
        - language #2
        .
        .
        .
    - YouTube links:
        - Teacher #1 + language
            - link(s) explanation #1
            - link(s) explanation #2
            .
            .
            .
        - Teacher #2 + language 
        .
        .
        .

> Explanation Book 2 details (if any)
.
.
.


5# IDEA OF REPO FOLDER STRUCTURE

./root
    /Books
        /{Category}
            /{Science}
                /{Sub-Science}
                    /{Sub-Field (if-any)}
                        /{book}.md


EXAMPLE:

./root
    /Books
        /Objective 
            /Aqeedah
                /Tawheed
                    /Kitaab at-Tahweed.md
        /Instrumental
        /Supplementary
